name: ai-powered-test-automation
description: Production-minded AI-powered API validation framework using Node.js, Anthropic, and OpenAI

scripts.test:unit:junit: npm run test:unit:json && node scripts/report-to-junit.js reports/unit-test-report.json reports/unit-test-report.xml unit-tests
scripts.test:integration:junit: npm run test:integration:json && node scripts/report-to-junit.js reports/integration-test-report.json reports/integration-test-report.xml integration-tests
scripts.test:mock:json: node scripts/run-and-report.js reports/mock-test-report.json "npm run test:mock || true"
scripts.test:mock:junit: npm run test:mock:json && node scripts/report-to-junit.js reports/mock-test-report.json reports/mock-test-report.xml mock-tests

author: Rahul Shukla
